ddls:
CREATE TABLE "books" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* International Standard Book Number (ISBN) */,
  "book_title" TEXT /* Title of the book */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the book */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the book */,
  "page_count" INTEGER /* Number of pages in the book */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the book */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the book */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the book (e.g., Paperback, Hardcover, eBook) */,
  "year_of_publication" INTEGER /* Year the book was published */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publisher of the book */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the publisher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the publisher */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the publisher */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the publisher */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the publisher was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the author */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the author */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the author */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the author */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the author's photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_authors" (
  "book_author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book-author relationship */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the author (e.g., primary author, co-author, editor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_authors_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_authors_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book image */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book the image belongs to */,
  "image_size" TEXT /* Size of the image (e.g., small, medium, large) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image */,
  "alt_text" TEXT /* Alternative text for the image for accessibility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_images_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)
column_names: Number of pages in the book
Format of the book (e.g., Paperback, Hardcover, eBook)
Reference to the publisher of the book
Contact email for inquiries about the publisher
Contact phone number of the publisher
Contact email for inquiries about the author
Date of birth of the author
Unique identifier for each book-author relationship
Role of the author (e.g., primary author, co-author, editor)
Unique identifier for each book image
ID of the book the image belongs to
Size of the image (e.g., small, medium, large)
Alternative text for the image for accessibility
